TCS World 10K Bengaluru, 2026. Course Time: 01:05:44 | Pace: 6:35 min/km. I gave it my all and finished the race with a timing better than during the trainings. The race tested the efforts that I put into the training. I trained hard for it and surely got rewarded. Coming from a different city to run in Bengaluru was thrilling. The climb and the humidity made it exhausting. Being assigned to Coral D was a disadvantage with a large number of runners on the race route making it over crowded. Lots of lessons to learn and implement. A huge thanks to the people of Bengaluru supporting throughout the race course, cheering, giving high-fives, the energy was just commendable and made it even more memorable. @tcsw10k Carousel

Tata Mumbai Marathon 2026 - Half Marathon | 21.1KMs What an unforgettable experience! The humidity was at its peak, pushing every step but the energy on the course made it all worth it. Running on the iconic Sea Link was absolutely surreal. The spirit of Mumbai truly shined - the Mumbaikars, the volunteers, the run clubs cheering endlessly, clapping, motivating and spreading pure positivity throughout the route. The vibe of the city was just electric, fell in love with Mumbai.🙌♥️ Incredibly well organised marathon. Challenging, sweaty, exhausting and yet unbelievably fun. Carousel

Soul soothing! In the lap of the mighty Mount Harmukh. What a beautiful experience it was to camp and play at the Nundkol lake, to sit by the lake and watch little fish jumping out of water making ripples. #kgl #kashmirgreatlakes #kashmirgreatlakestrek Clip
